title: 5.2 The Circulatory and Lymphatic System
description: The circulatory and lymphatic systems — every fact from the Grade 10 Biology textbook.

questions.question: What is the primary function of the circulatory system?
options: To move blood throughout the body
questions.correctAnswer: To move blood throughout the body
